dataset_fields.label: Organization
dataset_fields.help_text: Select the organization for which you manage this dataset.

dataset_fields.label: Resource title
dataset_fields.form_placeholder: eg. Maritime transport, Coralligenous communities, Offshore sand deposits
dataset_fields.help_text: The following scheme should be used (optional elements, indicated in square brackets): "Original Title of the resource (in English) - [Location] - [Acronym] - [Year] [Resource owner/provider, in brackets]". Be concise, using optional elements when they help to better identify a specific resource among similar ones. Example: "Fisheries sectors - Southern Adriatic Sea - GSA - 2015 (FAO)".

dataset_fields.label: Partner
dataset_fields.help_text: Please, do not change this value

dataset_fields.label: Resource abstract
dataset_fields.help_text: Describe in a few sentences the content and the purpose of the resource.

dataset_fields.label: Original title
dataset_fields.help_text: Resource title in its native language (unless this is English), if already available

dataset_fields.label: Original abstract
dataset_fields.help_text: Abstract in its native language (unless this is English), if already available

dataset_fields.label: Topic category
dataset_fields.help_text: High-level dataset thematic classification to assist in the grouping and search of available datasets.

dataset_fields.label: Sub category
dataset_fields.help_text: More detailed dataset thematic classification. Please use a value from the field "Title" used in the tables of the MSP cluster scheme

dataset_fields.label: Resource language
dataset_fields.help_text: Language of the dataset as found, for example, in attribute tables for geospatial datasets or in text for documents.

dataset_fields.label: Domain area
dataset_fields.help_text: Geographical area covered or representative of the dataset. (Please start typing to search).

dataset_fields.label: Owner
dataset_fields.help_text: This is a list of one or more names (e.g. EMODnet, EEA, Eurostat) identifying the ownership of the resource.

dataset_fields.label: Provider
dataset_fields.help_text: This is a list of one or more names (e.g. EMODnet, EEA, Eurostat) identifying the provider of the resource. E. g. This could be the owner of the geo-portal or SDI through which the resource is available.

dataset_fields.label: Data portal
dataset_fields.form_placeholder: eg. ADRIPLAN, SHAPE, EMODNet Human activities
dataset_fields.help_text: Portal where the dataset is published/downloadable/etc. (if any).

dataset_fields.label: Presentation form
dataset_fields.help_text: Select the value from the list which is closer to the type of structure and presentation form of the dataset.

choices.label: Map (map represented in raster or vector form)

dataset_fields.label: Spatial representation
dataset_fields.help_text: In case of geospatial information, select the specific type of spatial representation from the list; if the dataset has no geospatial coomponent, select "No geo".

choices.label: epsg:41001 WGS84 / Simple Mercator -- Spherical Mercator

dataset_fields.help_text: Identifier of the coordinate reference system(s) used in the data set. Only identifiers contained in the EPSG Geodetic Parameter Dataset shall be used (e.g. 4326). Refer to the following URLs for more info and to find the proper EPSG code: epsg.io or spatialreference.org.
Available interoperable services to view or download the resource.

dataset_fields.label: Derives from
dataset_fields.help_text: If this dataset derives (as a subset, elaboration, derived product, ...) from another dataset already present in the catalogue, select that dataset in this field.

dataset_fields.label: Successor of
dataset_fields.help_text: Select related datasets

dataset_fields.label: Temporal extent
dataset_fields.help_text: Time period covered by the content of the dataset. Use this field to specify ad individual date or to specify the START date of a time period.
Use this field in combination with the previous one to specify the END date of a time period.

dataset_fields.label: Spatial extent
dataset_fields.help_text: GeoJSON feature

dataset_fields.label: Data accessibility
dataset_fields.form_placeholder: A description of the level of resource accessibility.
dataset_fields.help_text: Indicate whether and how the dataset is accessible (visible, downloadable, sent on request, not accessible, etc.) Add information to explain limitations and restrictions to access or use. Use this field alone or to supplement the 'Licence' field.

dataset_fields.label: License
dataset_fields.help_text: If the dataset has an explicit license associated, select it form the list. If useful, use the filed "Data accessibility" to add/specify details regarding the license.

dataset_fields.label: Validation level
dataset_fields.help_text: Select from the list a value describing the level of validation to which the dataset has been subjected.

dataset_fields.label: Additional information
dataset_fields.help_text: Add here any information you consider useful to better describe the dataset or to integrate the information present in the abstract.

dataset_fields.label: Metadata completeness
dataset_fields.help_text: Use this field to keep track of whether you feel the dataset has been described by all fields, to the best of your knowledge, or whether you have yet to complete some of them.

dataset_fields.label: Notes
dataset_fields.help_text: Use this field to note down doubts, points you are unsure of or annotations useful to other metadata editors. When the dataset has been fully described this field should be empty.

dataset_fields.label: MSFD Classes

choices.label: Ecosystems, including food webs - Biological characteristics
Ecosystems, including food webs - Functions and processes
Pressure: Biological - Input or spread of non-indigenous species
Pressure: Biological - Input of microbial pathogens
Pressure: Biological - Input of genetically modified species and translocation of native species
Pressure: Biological - Disturbance of species due to human presence
Pressure: Biological - Extraction of, or mortality/injury to, wild species
Pressure: Physical - Physical disturbance to seabed
Pressure: Physical - Changes to hydrological conditions
Pressure: Substances, litter and energy - Input of nutrients - diffuse sources, point sources, atmospheric deposition
Pressure: Substances, litter and energy - Input of organic matter - diffuse sources and point sources
Pressure: Substances, litter and energy - Input of other substances - diffuse sources, point sources, atmospheric deposition, acute events
Pressure: Substances, litter and energy - Input of litter
Pressure: Substances, litter and energy - Input of anthropogenic sound
Pressure: Substances, litter and energy - Input of other forms of energy
Pressure: Substances, litter and energy - Input of water - point sources

dataset_fields.help_text: Ecosystem elements, anthropogenic pressures based on the classification indicated in Annex III of the MSFD (as ammended by Directive EU 2017/845)

dataset_fields.label: MSFD Descriptors/Criteria

choices.label: D6 Sea-floor integrity/D1 Biodiversity - benthic habitats
D1C1 Mortality rate from incidental by-catch
D1C4 Population distributional range and pattern
D5C6 Opportunistic macroalgae of benthic habitats
D5C7 Macrophyte communities of benthic habitats
D5C8 Macrofaunal communities of benthic habitats
D6C1 Physical loss of the seabed
D6C2 Physical disturbance to the seabed
D6C3 Adverse effects from physical disturbance
D7C1 Permanent alteration of hydrographical conditions
D7C2 Adverse effects from permanent alteration of hydrographical conditions
D8C4 Adverse effects of significant acute pollution events

dataset_fields.help_text: Select the associated MSFD descriptor(s) and when possible the associated MSFD criteria(s) as defined by Commission Decision (EU) 2017/848

dataset_fields.label: Non MSFD Classes
dataset_fields.help_text: Select these options if the data does not meet the MSFD descriptors or criteria (e.g. emerged coastal habitats, non-seabirds, etc.)

dataset_fields.label: WFD
dataset_fields.help_text: Select these options for data generated in relation to monitoring under the Water Framework Directive

start_form_page.title: MSP - Conservation
start_form_page.description: Protected areas, OECM, IBA, EBSA, CCH, IMMA, ...

dataset_fields.label: Types

choices.label: Internationally designated  Protected Areas (marine and coastal)
Regionally designated Protected Areas (marine and coastal)
Nationally designated Protected Areas (marine and coastal)
Potential Other Effective area-based Conservation Measures (OECMs)

dataset_fields.help_text: Regionally' refers to a specific geographical area or a limited part of the world (e.g. the Mediterranean Region')

dataset_fields.label: Zonation
dataset_fields.help_text: Specify whether the dataset encompasses zoning information related to protected areas

choices.label: Cultural entertainment and recreational services - Nautical sports

Cultural entertainment and recreational services - Underwater cultural heritage

start_form_page.title: MSP - Relevance
start_form_page.description: Relevance of the dataset / resource in supporting the MSP process at different spatial scales and temporal frames

resource_fields.label: Resource type
resource_fields.help_text: Select from the list the type of resource.

resource_fields.label: Source
resource_fields.help_text: If you refer to a resource already available elsewhere, use 'Link' to add the URL where it is accessible. Otherwise, you can upload the resource directly to the catalogue via 'Upload'.

resource_fields.label: Name
resource_fields.form_placeholder: A descriptive short name for the resource

resource_fields.label: Description
resource_fields.help_text: Brief description of the resource (e.g. content of a document or of a web page, description of all relevant attribute fields for a geospatial dataset, ...).
resource_fields.form_placeholder: Some useful notes about the data

resource_fields.label: Format
resource_fields.help_text: Please select the format of the data resouce, e.g. wms, wfs, html, ecc. (for web pages, inclung mapviewers).
